cases.title: Valid cover image upload is served from controlled media path with correct Content-Type
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
Editable event owned by OrganizerAdmin
Valid OrganizerAdmin JWT
Valid JPEG, PNG, or WebP image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image as multipart upload with allowed image file
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} and capture coverImageUrl
GET coverImageUrl (GET /api/v1/media/events/{key})
cases.expected: Upload succeeds; event persists cover_image_key; coverImageUrl resolves under /api/v1/media/events/ controlled route; media GET returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type matching uploaded format (image/jpeg, image/png, or image/webp); satisfies NFR-18 validation and controlled storage serving

cases.title: Uploaded cover file persisted under configured uploads directory with storage key format
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event
UPLOADS_DIR configured per local development setup
Valid image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with valid image
Read cover_image_key from events row or API response
Verify file exists only under UPLOADS_DIR at path derived from key
cases.expected: cover_image_key stored in database; physical file exists under controlled uploads directory; no file written outside configured storage root; NFR-18 controlled storage path requirement met

cases.title: Event list and detail coverImageUrl uses API media route not raw filesystem path
preconditions: Event with cover_image_key set from prior valid upload
Public or authenticated GET access to event list and detail
steps: GET /api/v1/events and locate event with cover
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} for same event
Inspect coverImageUrl values in both responses
cases.expected: coverImageUrl values use /api/v1/media/events/{key} pattern; no absolute filesystem paths, file:// URLs, or direct UPLOADS_DIR exposure in API payloads; NFR-18 served-from-controlled-path contract honored for display

cases.title: Cover image validator accepts only image/jpeg, image/png, and image/webp within size limit
preconditions: Cover image validation module (validateCoverImage or equivalent) available for unit test
steps: Call validator for image/jpeg, image/png, and image/webp with size under 5 MB
Assert each allowed MIME type passes without throwing
cases.expected: All three API-design §2.7 allowed MIME types pass validation; unit-level guarantee of NFR-18 allowed-type policy before domain execution

cases.title: Cover image validator rejects disallowed MIME types before persistence
preconditions: Cover image validation module available for unit test
steps: Call validator with disallowed types such as image/gif, application/pdf, text/plain, and application/octet-stream
Assert each invocation fails with invalid-input semantics
cases.expected: Disallowed MIME types rejected at validation layer; no storage key or file path produced; satisfies NFR-18 allowed MIME type constraint

cases.title: Cover image validator enforces 5 MB maximum byte size
preconditions: Cover image validation module with COVER_IMAGE_MAX_BYTES constant (5_000_000)
steps: Call validator with allowed MIME type and size equal to 5 MB
Call validator with same MIME type and size 5 MB + 1 byte
cases.expected: At-limit size passes; over-limit size fails with invalid-input error referencing max bytes; NFR-18 maximum size enforced at validation boundary

cases.title: API rejects oversized multipart upload before cover_image_key persistence
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event without cover
Valid MIME image file larger than 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with oversized file
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} and query events.cover_image_key in database
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with stable invalid-input error code; cover_image_key remains null; no file written under uploads directory; NFR-18 size limit enforced at API boundary

cases.title: Media handler serves files only from configured uploads directory via key lookup
preconditions: Valid cover uploaded and cover_image_key known
API media handler mounted at GET /media/events/{key}
steps: GET /api/v1/media/events/{validKey} for uploaded cover
Verify response body matches uploaded bytes and Content-Type header
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with correct image bytes and Content-Type; file resolved through controlled handler mapping key to UPLOADS_DIR; no arbitrary filesystem read; NFR-18 controlled storage path serving satisfied

cases.title: Each allowed image format returns matching Content-Type on media GET
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and three editable events (or sequential upload/delete)
Valid JPEG, PNG, and WebP fixtures each under 5 MB
steps: Upload JPEG cover; GET media endpoint and record Content-Type
Replace with PNG; GET media endpoint and record Content-Type
Replace with WebP; GET media endpoint and record Content-Type
cases.expected: Media responses return image/jpeg, image/png, and image/webp respectively; browsers and clients can render covers correctly; NFR-18 MIME validation contract consistent through serve path

cases.title: Disallowed MIME type upload rejected with no storage side effects
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event
Non-image file such as application/pdf or image/gif
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with disallowed file
Verify events.cover_image_key unchanged and uploads directory has no new file for event
cases.expected: HTTP 400 invalid input; cover_image_key null or unchanged; no orphan file on disk; NFR-18 MIME validation blocks unsafe uploads before persistence

cases.title: Cover upload at exactly 5 MB accepted; one byte over rejected
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event without cover
Fixtures: valid WebP at exactly 5_000_000 bytes and at 5_000_001 bytes
steps: POST cover-image with 5 MB file and confirm success
DELETE cover-image to reset
POST cover-image with 5 MB + 1 byte file
cases.expected: At-limit upload succeeds and is servable via media route; over-limit returns HTTP 400; boundary enforced consistently per API max 5 MB and NFR-18 size constraint

cases.title: Empty file (zero bytes) rejected by cover image validator
preconditions: Cover image validation module available for unit test
steps: Call validator with allowed MIME type image/png and size 0
cases.expected: Validation fails with invalid-input error; zero-byte uploads cannot bypass NFR-18 MIME and size checks

cases.title: Media route rejects path traversal and invalid keys without filesystem escape
preconditions: API server running with media handler
No valid cover for traversal test keys
steps: GET /api/v1/media/events/../etc/passwd and URL-encoded traversal variants
GET /api/v1/media/events/nonexistent-key-uuid
cases.expected: Traversal attempts return 404 or 400; no arbitrary filesystem read outside UPLOADS_DIR; invalid keys do not leak directory contents; NFR-18 controlled storage path confinement enforced

cases.title: GET media for deleted cover key returns not found without serving stale file
preconditions: Event with uploaded cover and known cover_image_key
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: DELETE /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image
GET /api/v1/media/events/{previousKey}
cases.expected: Media GET for removed key returns HTTP 404; file removed or unreachable from controlled handler; no continued serve of deleted cover outside controlled lifecycle

cases.title: Declared allowed MIME with mismatched or missing multipart field rejected at API validation
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event
Multipart request with missing file part or wrong Content-Type header on file field
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with empty multipart body
POST with file field but unsupported or missing Content-Type declaration
cases.expected: HTTP 400 invalid input; no cover_image_key persisted; malformed uploads cannot bypass NFR-18 MIME validation gate
